Title: Security Management Process
Description: Implement policies and procedures to prevent detect contain and correct security violations

Title: Risk Analysis
Description: Conduct an accurate and thorough assessment of potential risks and vulnerabilities to ePHI

Title: Risk Management
Description: Implement security measures to reduce risks and vulnerabilities to a reasonable and appropriate level

Title: Sanction Policy
Description: Apply appropriate sanctions against workforce members who fail to comply with security policies

Title: Information System Activity Review
Description: Implement procedures to regularly review records of information system activity

Title: Assigned Security Responsibility
Description: Identify the security official responsible for developing and implementing security policies

Title: Workforce Security
Description: Implement policies and procedures to ensure appropriate access to ePHI for workforce members

Title: Authorization and/or Supervision
Description: Implement procedures for authorizing and supervising workforce members who work with ePHI

Title: Workforce Clearance Procedure
Description: Implement procedures to determine that workforce member access is appropriate

Title: Termination Procedures
Description: Implement procedures for terminating access to ePHI when employment ends

Title: Information Access Management
Description: Implement policies and procedures for authorizing access to ePHI

Title: Isolating Healthcare Clearinghouse Functions
Description: If a clearinghouse is part of a larger organization isolate its ePHI functions

Title: Access Authorization
Description: Implement policies and procedures for granting access to ePHI

Title: Access Establishment and Modification
Description: Implement policies and procedures for establishing modifying and terminating access to ePHI

Title: Security Awareness and Training
Description: Implement a security awareness and training program for all workforce members

Title: Security Reminders
Description: Implement periodic security updates and reminders

Title: Protection from Malicious Software
Description: Implement procedures for guarding against detecting and reporting malicious software

Title: Log-in Monitoring
Description: Implement procedures for monitoring log-in attempts and reporting discrepancies

Title: Password Management
Description: Implement procedures for creating changing and safeguarding passwords

Title: Security Incident Procedures
Description: Implement policies and procedures to address security incidents

Title: Response and Reporting
Description: Identify and respond to suspected or known security incidents and mitigate harmful effects

Title: Contingency Plan
Description: Establish policies and procedures for responding to emergencies that damage systems containing ePHI

Title: Data Backup Plan
Description: Establish and implement procedures to create and maintain retrievable exact copies of ePHI

Title: Disaster Recovery Plan
Description: Establish and implement procedures to restore any loss of data

Title: Emergency Mode Operation Plan
Description: Establish procedures to enable continuation of critical business processes for ePHI protection during emergency

Title: Testing and Revision Procedures
Description: Implement procedures for periodic testing and revision of contingency plans

Title: Applications and Data Criticality Analysis
Description: Assess the relative criticality of specific applications and data in support of contingency plans

Title: Evaluation
Description: Perform periodic technical and nontechnical evaluation to determine extent security policies meet Security Rule requirements

Title: Business Associate Contracts and Other Arrangements
Description: Ensure satisfactory assurances from business associates that they will safeguard ePHI

Title: Written Contract or Other Arrangement
Description: Document the satisfactory assurances through a written contract or other arrangement

Title: Facility Access Controls
Description: Implement policies and procedures to limit physical access to information systems

Title: Contingency Operations
Description: Establish procedures for facility access in support of data restoration under disaster recovery and emergency plans

Title: Facility Security Plan
Description: Implement policies and procedures to safeguard the facility and equipment from unauthorized access tampering and theft

Title: Access Control and Validation Procedures
Description: Implement procedures to control and validate access to facilities based on role or function

Title: Maintenance Records
Description: Implement policies and procedures to document repairs and modifications to physical security components

Title: Workstation Use
Description: Implement policies and procedures specifying proper functions and physical attributes of workstation surroundings

Title: Workstation Security
Description: Implement physical safeguards for all workstations that access ePHI restricting access to authorized users

Title: Device and Media Controls
Description: Implement policies and procedures governing the receipt and removal of hardware and electronic media

Title: Disposal
Description: Implement policies and procedures to address final disposition of ePHI and hardware or media on which it is stored

Title: Media Re-use
Description: Implement procedures for removal of ePHI from electronic media before reuse

Title: Accountability
Description: Maintain a record of movements of hardware and electronic media and responsible persons

Title: Data Backup and Storage
Description: Create a retrievable exact copy of ePHI before moving equipment

Title: Access Control
Description: Implement technical policies and procedures for information systems that maintain ePHI to allow access only to authorized persons

Title: Unique User Identification
Description: Assign a unique name or number for identifying and tracking user identity

Title: Emergency Access Procedure
Description: Establish procedures for obtaining necessary ePHI during an emergency

Title: Automatic Logoff
Description: Implement electronic procedures that terminate sessions after a predetermined period of inactivity

Title: Encryption and Decryption
Description: Implement a mechanism to encrypt and decrypt ePHI

Title: Audit Controls
Description: Implement hardware software or procedural mechanisms that record and examine activity in systems containing ePHI

Title: Integrity
Description: Implement policies and procedures to protect ePHI from improper alteration or destruction

Title: Mechanism to Authenticate ePHI
Description: Implement electronic mechanisms to corroborate that ePHI has not been altered or destroyed

Title: Person or Entity Authentication
Description: Implement procedures to verify that a person or entity seeking access to ePHI is the one claimed

Title: Transmission Security
Description: Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to ePHI transmitted over electronic networks

Title: Integrity Controls
Description: Implement security measures to ensure electronically transmitted ePHI is not improperly modified without detection

Title: Encryption
Description: Implement a mechanism to encrypt ePHI whenever deemed appropriate

Title: Policies and Procedures
Description: Implement reasonable and appropriate policies and procedures to comply with the Security Rule

Title: Documentation
Description: Maintain written policies and procedures and written records of required actions activities or assessments

Title: Time Limit
Description: Retain documentation for 6 years from the date of creation or last effective date

Title: Availability
Description: Make documentation available to those responsible for implementing security procedures

Title: Updates
Description: Review documentation periodically and update as needed in response to changes
